items_flat.title_en: Groq founder discusses a major NVIDIA partnership and inference strategy
items_flat.title_zh: Groq 創辦人談大型 NVIDIA 合作與推論策略
items_flat.summary_en: The interview covered a decade of accelerator development, GPU-versus-LPU tradeoffs, and how inference economics are reshaping AI infrastructure.
items_flat.summary_zh: 訪談回顧十年加速器研發、GPU 與 LPU 的取捨，以及推論經濟如何重塑 AI 基礎設施。

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic signals a faster frontier-model release cadence
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 透露更快的前沿模型更新節奏
items_flat.summary_en: Discussion of Anthropic's roadmap suggested frontier upgrades every two to four months, reflecting the industry's shortening product cycles.
items_flat.summary_zh: 關於 Anthropic 路線圖的討論顯示，前沿能力可能每二至四個月更新一次，反映產業產品週期持續縮短。

anthropic.title_en: Anthropic signals a faster frontier-model release cadence
anthropic.title_zh: Anthropic 透露更快的前沿模型更新節奏
anthropic.summary_en: Discussion of Anthropic's roadmap suggested frontier upgrades every two to four months, reflecting the industry's shortening product cycles.
anthropic.summary_zh: 關於 Anthropic 路線圖的討論顯示，前沿能力可能每二至四個月更新一次，反映產業產品週期持續縮短。
